case_title: VALENCIA, HERMELINDA et al vs. VELARDE, ARTHUR et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VELARDE, ARTHUR
ADDED TO ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-31-1999 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALENCIA, HERMELINDA NAZARENO, MAYUMI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELARDE, ARTHUR $13,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,000.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFF MAYUMI NAZARENO $6000 AND PLAINTIFF HERMELINDA VALENCIA $7000. NO AWARD MADE AS TO COSTS.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON AUG-19-1999
